steps.title: Identify the noun being replaced
steps.content: ”The types of pop culture references” (plural) are what's gone from the sculpture. The blank in “In ______ place” requires a possessive pronoun referring back to this plural noun.

steps.title: Apply pronoun agreement
steps.content: ”Their” is the right possessive pronoun here. “Its” is singular; “they're” and “it's” are contractions of verb forms, not possessives. That matches choice C — C is correct.
